title: Debt management report 2016 to 2017
body: "This report sets out the remits for the Treasury’s agents, the Debt Management Office and National Savings and Investments, that explain how the government will achieve its required level of financing. It also contains information on the financing for the Official Reserves and sets out the DMO’s cash management remit.  More information on the government’s debt management activities can be found on the DMO and the NS&I. "
